description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent black gabled roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by wooden columns, leading to a main entrance flanked by symmetrical windows. On one side, a large garage door is visible, while the rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a wooden deck and a swimming pool, surrounded by dense greenery and trees. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is well-maintained, with paved walkways and a driveway connecting to the street. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, creating a comfortable suburban residence.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a black gabled roof, covered front porch, garage, and a backyard deck with a pool surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, driveway, and partial view of the backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, swimming pool, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard deck, pool, and a side window.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
